title: Inventory swapping
description: puts your selected slot into your inventory when a key is pressed. OR puts your entire hotbar into your inventory when another key is pressed.
body:
Inventory Swapping is a simple mod that lets you quickly move items from your hotbar to empty slots in your inventory with a single key press. No need to drag and drop, just press the key, and the mod handles the rest.

Designed for players who want a cleaner, more organized hotbar without the hassle of moving them out of the hotbar yourself

![gif of player swapping slots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86e2468cf2680487028eca6449bb856ada315fb8.gif)


Join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d) You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code)
